title: Ungrateful Villagers
body:
This mod reverts the 1.20.2 changes to Zombie Villager curing, allowing you to once again stack curing discounts, up to 5 cures (the same as it used to be). Because you shouldn't simply decide something is a "bug" after 7 years. Make villagers grateful again!

Version 1.0.1 provides additional changes to zombification behavior, which means villagers that have been traded with will always be zombified when killed by a zombie, regardless of difficulty. This means you aren't forced to play on Hard difficulty just so you can safely get villager curing discounts. (In vanilla, villagers will always or sometimes (respectively) just die when killed by a zombie on Easy or Normal difficulty.)

If you do not want this additional tweak, please use version 1.0.0, which only includes the fix for cure discount stacking.

This mod is Server-Side only, meaning it can be used on a dedicated server without clients needing to have this (or any) mod installed. It can also be used in singleplayer.

Feel free to use this in your modpack or whatever else.
